chunks.text: ORDIR-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt Ptition No [)- 262 0[ 2015. Dato Or hrariny Order with signature Of Judge,31,082016. LOR ORDERS ONMAINTAINABILIIY ٨r Abid Hussain Qadri Advocate for petitioner Mr Nisar Ahmed G Abro, D.A.G Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner has filed this petition as he had received excessive bill from SEPCO. He further submits that the petitioner now does not intend to pursue this petition, as he 1s going to file an application to Electric Inspector for redressal of his grievance; however this petition may be disposed of directing the Electric Inspector that if such application is filed by the petitioner the same may be decided in accordance with law Order accordingly The petition stands disposed of Judge ہلماا, Judge ary
